claims.claim: We construct a three-stage evaluation: (1) a synthetic pilot generating 1,500 curated and 1,500 uncurated requests, (2) a live-telemetry ingestion step using 1,000 rows from a neighboring OpenAI-compatible benchmark corpus, and (3) a native target-workflow trace of 1,500 rows across structured extraction, code navigation, and abstention calibration.
